description_long: This is a single-story suburban house with a hip roof and a mix of dark and light exterior siding. The front yard features a well-maintained lawn, flower beds, and mature trees, while the backyard includes a driveway, parked cars, and a small patio area with outdoor furniture. The house has large, evenly spaced windows along the front and side facades, providing ample natural light to the interior. A black metal fence encloses the property, with gates for vehicle and pedestrian access. The main entryway is marked by double doors and is flanked by trash bins and a paved walkway. The overall design is simple and functional, with a focus on comfort and accessibility.
description: A single-story suburban house with a hip roof, large windows, and a fenced yard featuring trees, flower beds, and a driveway with parked cars.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the driveway, parked cars, patio furniture, and two large trees behind the house.
description_view_1: Side view with the main entryway, double doors, trash bins, a car parked along the side, and a fenced yard.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the main lawn, flower beds, large windows, and two prominent trees in the front yard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the side windows, fence, and additional trees along the property edge.
attribute_entryway_design: Double doors with a small paved entry, no porch, flanked by trash bins and a simple overhang.
